meta.title: Meme Detector — Spot the Next 10x Memecoin Gems
meta.description: Machine Learning scans 5,000+ memecoins daily across Solana, Ethereum, and Base to spot the next gems before anyone else.
meta.og_description: ML scans 5,000+ memecoins daily. AI-powered trading signals.

hero.subtitle_suffix: memecoins daily across Solana, Ethereum, and Base
hero.disclaimer_text: Data analysis tool. Not financial advice.

pipeline.section_subtitle: From raw data to actionable signals

steps.title: DATA
steps.detail: We collect data from Solana, Ethereum, and Base every day from 11 different sources.

steps.title: FEATURES
steps.detail: Each token is described with 94 numeric variables: holder concentration, LP depth, volume, volatility, and more.

steps.title: MODEL
steps.detail: Three algorithms vote together. Only signals with consensus pass the filter.

steps.title: SIGNAL
steps.detail: You receive signals classified by confidence directly on your Telegram.

backtesting.section_subtitle: Based on real v21 model data: STRONG gem rate 52%, win rate 71% (2x+). Not actual past performance.
backtesting.transparency_note: This simulation uses real v21 model data: STRONG 52% gem rate (median 3.71x), STRONG+MEDIUM 25% gem rate, win rates based on tokens reaching 2x+. Not actual past performance.
backtesting.track_record_note: Real track record available in the dashboard.
backtesting.disclaimer: WARNING: Estimated simulation based on model v21 metrics. Verifiable track record with real data coming soon (we have been collecting data since March 2026). Past performance does not guarantee future results.

pricing.email_note: Use the same email as your Meme Detector account
pricing.pro_anchor: Less than one bad trade commission

items.question: What is a gem?
items.answer: A token that rises 10x or more from its initial price. Our model classifies tokens into 5 categories: rug (total loss), loss (>50% drop), neutral, winner (2-10x), and gem (10x+).

items.question: Why isn't it free?
items.answer: Free Telegram bots use volume or mentions-based alerts. Our model analyzes 22 variables per token including holder concentration, liquidity depth, and momentum. That difference is why 40% of our STRONG signals are real gems.

items.question: How does the ML model work?
items.answer: An ensemble of Random Forest + XGBoost. Trained on 22 features extracted from 7,900+ tokens. Current metrics: AUC 0.914, Recall 69%. The model analyzes tokenomics, liquidity, price action, holder concentration, and market context.

items.question: Which blockchains do you support?
items.answer: Solana, Ethereum, and Base. Data collected from GeckoTerminal (price/volume), DexScreener (buyers/sellers), Helius RPC (Solana holders), Etherscan (contract verification), and Birdeye (supplementary data).

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. No lock-in or commitment. Cancel from your profile or directly through the Stripe portal. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.

items.question: Can I lose money?
items.answer: Yes. Memecoins are extremely volatile. Our model has a Recall of 69% — it catches most real gems, but not every signal becomes a gem. This is NOT financial advice. DYOR (Do Your Own Research). Never invest more than you can afford to lose.

items.question: What data do you collect?
items.answer: Email and Telegram ID (optional for alerts). We do not sell data to third parties. Fully GDPR compliant. You can request deletion of your data at any time. See our Privacy Policy.

final_cta.headline: How many more gems will you watch from the sidelines?

footer.disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: Meme Detector is an automated analysis tool. It does not constitute financial advice. Memecoins are highly speculative assets and you can lose your entire investment. DYOR.
